metadata.use_for: Supplement/addendum to the KB master index. Preserve full content.

content.s0_quick_reference_internal: - Internal reference file. Do not share verbatim with patients.
content.s1_claims_discipline_internal:
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# VALENTINE KNOWLEDGE BASE v6.2 — INDEX MASTER
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TAGS: index, navigation, structure, overview, cross-reference, file list, KB map, where to find, which file, file directory, table of contents, help, guide, topic, search, find, category, condition, treatment, system, organ, lookup, reference map, patient says, routing, primary file, also check, clinical tools, modalities, foundations, special populations, care level, dossier, FBCA, clinical report, biomarker atlas, calculated ratios, derived indices
# CATEGORY: Core Reference
# USE FOR: Finding the right file, understanding KB structure, cross-referencing topics
#
# v6.2 ADDITIONS (2026-02-28):
# - 78_CLINICAL_REASONING_BRIDGES: NEW FILE — Causal chain library. Cross-system
#   mechanistic intelligence that no single organ file contains. 3 founding chains:
#   (01) Postmenopausal Bone Deficit — estrogen/progesterone dual-axis bone loss,
#   RANKL disinhibition + osteoblast PR pathway + GH/IGF-1 axis suppression, fracture
#   non-union mechanism, intervention sequencing HRT → GH secretagogues → BPC-157+TB-500;
#   (02) Progesterone-Sleep-Bone Triangle — allopregnanolone/GABA-A second-half sleep
#   architecture, GH pulse attrition, IGF-1 reduction chain, 2h/4h waking as diagnostic
#   fingerprint, single upstream correction breaks all three downstream effects;
#   (03) Unmonitored Active Vitamin D — calcitriol bypass of renal 1α-hydroxylase,
#   silent hypercalcemia risk, K2-MK7 absence = vascular calcification concurrent with
#   bone protocol, mandatory safety gate before any protocol.
#   Each chain structure: upstream cause / mechanism / manifestations / clinical signals /
#   intervention points / sequence rule / mandatory KB bundle / falsification.
#   This file grows with every complex multi-system case. 20 precise chains > 200 symptom maps.
#
# - 00_CRITICAL_REFERENCE: Updated — added Calcitriol Safety Gate (mandatory calcium +
#   eGFR before any protocol when calcitriol reported; non-specialist prescriber = YELLOW
#   flag; prior year labs invalid baseline) + K2-MK7 Mandatory Pairing rule (100-200mcg
#   MK-7 required whenever calcium + D3 combined; absence = vascular calcification risk).
#
# - 01_PROTOCOLS_OVERVIEW: Updated — added Intervention Sequencing Protocol (Section 2):
#   Terrain blockers → Cofactors → Interventions sequence with mechanistic rationale.
#   4 terrain blocker detection table from conversation signals. Internal sequence
#   detection logic Valentine runs before every Track B recommendation. Consequence
#   table for each skipped layer. Terrain correction vs delay clarification.
#
# - 14_SLEEP: Updated — added Sleep Fragmentation Timing Decoder: 6-pattern table
#   mapping waking timing to hormonal axis (progesterone/allopregnanolone, cortisol/HPA,
#   testosterone, thyroid/mitochondrial, OSA, multiple wakings). GH-bone connection
#   clinical note: first pulse likely intact at 2h waking; cumulative GH attrition from
#   second-half fragmentation → IGF-1 reduction → osteoblast blunting in healing context.
#
# - 18_FEMALE_HORMONES: Updated — added Bone-Hormone Mechanistic Chain section:
#   ERα/ERβ receptor mechanism on osteoblasts and osteoclasts (full molecular detail),
#   progesterone independent osteoblast stimulation via PR receptor (not estrogen-mediated),
#   GH pulsatility link via estrogen-GHRH axis, Sleep-Bone Triangle diagram,
#   clinical flags table for postmenopausal bone cases (presumptive YELLOW classification),
#   mandatory KB bundle for postmenopausal bone cases.
#
# - 20_JOINTS_MSK: Updated — added Fracture Healing Protocol section: 6-layer phenotype
#   map (mechanical/hormonal OS/mineral metabolism/vascular/GH-IGF-1/cofactors) with
#   sequence rule; LIPUS vs PEMF mechanism and evidence comparison; disuse vs systemic
#   osteopenia differentiation table (cause/location/reversibility/timeline); CRPS
#   Budapest criteria (4 symptom + 4 sign categories) + Vitamin C 500mg/day prevention
#   protocol; protein target 1.5-1.6g/kg for fracture (vs 1.2g standard);
#   vascular assessment post-immobilization protocol.
#
# - 33_PEPTIDES: Updated — added Bone Healing Peptide Stack section: BPC-157 mechanism
#   specific to bone (VEGF angiogenesis, FAK-paxillin osteoblast migration), TB-500
#   mechanism specific to bone (actin/cell migration, IL-6/TNF-α suppression, endothelial
#   proliferation), 12-week combined protocol table, GH secretagogue layer (ipamorelin +
#   CJC-1295 no DAC) with bone healing rationale and postmenopausal specific indication,
#   sequence rule diagram (safety → hormonal terrain → Layer 1 → Layer 2).
#
# - 00_INDEX_MASTER: Updated — v6.1 → v6.2, added #78 entries in clinical tools table
#   and cross-reference map, updated file count 80 → 81.
#
# v6.1 ADDITIONS (2026-02-24):
# - 77_IRON_METABOLISM_THALASSEMIA: NEW FILE — Precision iron medicine KB. Full
#   hepcidin-ferroportin-transferrin mechanistic axis. Thalassemia minor differentiation
#   protocol (Mentzer → sTfR → hemoglobin electrophoresis). sTfR as mandatory gating test
#   before any iron infusion decision. Recurrent iron deficiency upstream driver protocol
#   (H. pylori, celiac, parasites, menorrhagia, chronic inflammation). IV formulation
#   comparison: Monofer vs ferric carboxymaltose vs iron sucrose vs iron polymaltose —
#   decision algorithm with phosphate caveat (FCM). Anti-hepcidin cofactor stack: curcumin
#   (HAMP suppressor), lactoferrin, copper/ceruloplasmin, vitamin C. Iron overload
#   surveillance ladder + MRI T2* indications. Iron-thyroid link (TPO heme enzyme,
#   deiodinase cofactor). ICD-10 codes for insurance documentation. Competitor positioning
#   vs The Iron Suites Singapore (Dr. Daniel Yeo).
# - 00_INDEX_MASTER: Updated — added #77 entries for all iron/thalassemia/hepcidin
#   routing keywords and cross-reference map entries.
#
# v6.0 ADDITIONS (2026-02-21):
# - 76_UPPER_RESPIRATORY_SINUSITIS: NEW FILE — Chronic sinusitis full clinical KB.
#   5 phenotype classification (biofilm / eosinophilic-Th2 / neuroinflammatory-dental /
#   environmental-mold / post-menopausal mucosal substrate). Biofilm disruption protocol
#   (NAC 600mg x3, hypertonic saline, xylitol). Mouth breathing nocturnal cycle and mouth
#   tape intervention. Orange mucus = eosinophilic signal. Dental-sinus trigeminal axis:
#   OPG insufficient, CBCT required. Gut-sIgA-nasal axis. Melatonin immunological dose.
#   Epigenetic inflammatory lock (CD38/SIRT1/NF-κB — age ≥45 + >3 months). BLIS K12
#   upper respiratory probiotic. Complete phased protocols. Decision tree 9 steps.
# - 11_IMMUNE: Updated — sIgA gut-nasal axis, NAC biofilm disruptor mechanism, COUPLED +76
# - 14_SLEEP: Updated — mouth breathing nocturnal sinusitis loop, dry tongue signal,
#   mouth tape protocol, OSA distinction, COUPLED +76
# - 69_METHYLATION_EPIGENETICS: Updated — complete CD38/SIRT1/SIRT3/NF-κB epigenetic
#   inflammatory lock section with phenotype flags, intervention table, timeline
# - 73_ORAL_MICROBIOME: Updated — trigeminal neuroinflammation V2/dental-sinus axis,
#   OPG vs CBCT imaging rule, CBCT referral framing, COUPLED +76
# - 18_FEMALE_HORMONES: Updated — mucosal estrogen receptors (ERα/ERβ) nasal sinus,
#   triple mucosal dryness clinical signal, DHEA intracrinology for mucosal substrate,
#   5 assessment questions for post-menopausal + sinusitis, COUPLED +76
#
# v5.9 ADDITIONS:
# - 68_MCAS_HISTAMINE: Mast cell activation syndrome + histamine intolerance. Differential, stabilizer protocol, IV safety rules, driver treatment (SIBO/CIRS/Lyme/hormones). The 'reacts to everything' patient.
# - 69_METHYLATION_EPIGENETICS: Methionine cycle, SAM/SAH ratio, epigenetic clocks (Horvath/DunedinPACE), biological age optimization, undermethylation vs overmethylation, estrogen/neurotransmitter methylation, homocysteine protocol.
# - 70_CHRONOBIOLOGY: Circadian medicine. Meal timing, light entrainment, chrono-pharmacology (statin evening, aspirin bedtime, antihypertensive bedtime), supplement timing, lab collection circadian variation, chrono-oncology.
# - 71_SENESCENCE_SENOLYTICS: Zombie cells, SASP, GDF15 biomarker, senolytic protocol (fisetin/quercetin/D+Q), spermidine, rapamycin, exercise as most potent senolytic. Longevity tier protocol.
# - 72_REDOX_BIOLOGY: Redox Vulnerability Index (RVI), Nrf2/KEAP1, GSH cycle, NAC+glycine protocol, sulforaphane. Cancer pro-oxidant strategy. G6PD safety. The mechanistic core of Resimont framework.
# - 73_ORAL_MICROBIOME: P.gingivalis-Alzheimer link, oral-cardiovascular, oral-gut axis, nitric oxide oral pathway, antiseptic mouthwash harm, BLIS K12/M18 probiotics, oral-systemic clinical protocol.
# - 74_METABOLIC_ENDOTOXEMIA: LPS-TLR4 axis, gut bacteria → insulin resistance/depression/CVD/NAFLD. Cani framework. Berberine dual action, Akkermansia, butyrate, LBP biomarker.
#
# v5.9 ADDITIONS:
# - 68_MCAS_HISTAMINE: Mast Cell Activation Syndrome + histamine intolerance. Multi-system hyperreactivity, differential, mast cell stabilizer protocol, MCAS-POTS-EDS-mold connections.
# - 69_METHYLATION_EPIGENETICS: Methylation pathways, epigenetic clocks, biological age optimization, Nrf2, transsulfuration, undermethylation/overmethylation clinical protocols.
# - 70_CHRONOBIOLOGY: Circadian medicine, chrono-supplement timing, chrono-pharmacology, social jet lag, shift worker protocol, cancer chronotherapy.
# - 71_SENESCENCE_SENOLYTICS: Cellular senescence, SASP, zombie cells as aging driver, fisetin/quercetin/spermidine protocols, D+Q clinical context.
# - 72_REDOX_BIOLOGY: Full redox science, Nrf2/KEAP1 pathway, Redox Vulnerability Index (RVI), antioxidant hierarchy, pro-oxidant duality of vitamin C, cancer redox.
# - 73_ORAL_MICROBIOME: Oral-systemic connection, P. gingivalis-Alzheimer/CVD/cancer links, oral probiotic protocol, NO pathway destruction by mouthwash.
# - 74_METABOLIC_ENDOTOXEMIA: LPS-TLR4 mechanism linking leaky gut to ALL chronic disease, Patrice Cani framework, endotoxemia reduction protocol.
# - 75_LIPIDOMICS: Beyond LDL — ceramides, plasmalogens, SPMs, ApoB, Lp(a), sdLDL, omega-3 index, advanced cardiovascular risk stratification.
#
# v5.8 ADDITIONS:
# - 67_GLUTEN_CELIAC_NCGS: NEW FILE — Complete gluten pathway. Differential diagnosis
#   (Celiac vs NCGS vs Wheat Allergy), NCGS resolution protocol (Phases 1-4B),
#   zonulin monitoring timeline, gluten reintroduction ladder (sourdough → ancient grains),
#   malabsorption correction sequencing. Primary routing for ALL gluten queries.
#
# v5.7 ADDITIONS:
# - 66_LAB_ANALYSIS_ENGINE: NEW FILE — Master 9-step orchestrator for lab analysis, from raw values to finished dossier. Guarantees reproducible, exhaustive analysis workflow.
# - 65_BIOMARKER_ATLAS: NEW FILE — Individual biomarker reference atlas, 69 markers, 7-tier ranges, mechanistic interpretation, confounders, coupled systems
# - 35_LAB_INTERPRETATION: MAJOR UPGRADE — 15+ calculated ratios & derived indices (TyG, NLR, PLR, AST:ALT, Ca:P, Na:K, Osmolality, AIP, Cortisol:DHEA, T:E2, etc.), 6 cross-system pattern combinations, expanded 7-tier ranges for GGT/eGFR/CPK/RDW/etc., KEY RATIOS quick reference expanded from 4 to 20
# 
# v5.6 ADDITIONS:
# - 64_DOSSIER_PROTOCOL: Clinical dossier generation standards, terrain gating, probability hierarchy
# - 35_LAB_INTERPRETATION: Dual Free T assay ranges (direct vs calculated), cortisol AM limitation
# - 17_MALE_HORMONES: Dual Free T assay ranges, % Free T metric
# - 61_TERRAIN_ASSESSMENT: Cortisol AM single-snapshot caveat, DUTCH confirmation protocol
# - 09_HPA_ADRENAL: Expanded blood test limitation section, cortisol confounders
# - 19_CARDIOVASCULAR: Thyroid-Lipid Interaction quantitative framework, ApoB prioritization
# - 32_IV_THERAPIES: Terrain gating prerequisite for NAD+ protocols
# - 08_LONGEVITY_NAD: Terrain prerequisite section, CD38 inflammation gate
# - 57_THYROID_COMPLETE: Thyroid-lipid coupling, 19_CARDIOVASCULAR cross-reference
# - Total: 67 files
#
# v5.5 ADDITIONS:
# - 63_SPORT_PERFORMANCE_CONTEXT: Training-aware lab interpretation for athletes
# - CARE_LEVEL tags added to all therapy files (STANDARD / OFF-LABEL-EVIDENCE / EXPERIMENTAL)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 67 files | 4 categories + special populations + clinical tools
# Every file has: TAGS, CATEGORY, USE FOR, COUPLED_SYSTEMS
# Many files have: RED_FLAGS, TRIAGE_QUESTIONS, CARE_LEVEL (v5.5)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
